data.content: Plan: add regression tests across 5 test files covering bundle parsing validation (~40 lines), per-step StepMetadata resolution (~30 lines), prompt conditional section rendering (~40 lines), legacy backward compat (~20 lines), and loom_compat_bundle assertions (~10 lines). ~140 total new test lines. Depends on c8f4 and 0d93 for full coverage. No Playwright needed — rendering is server-side Rust. No code changes during planning.
